notes: Issue #19, authored by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). LIVE recipe recipes/aut_bundespraesident.yml over the TYPO3 tx_news archive /aktuelles. Probe --spread: 1298 speech links, title(.news-single h1)/text(.news-single-content)/date(time@datetime) all green on samples across 2018-2026; coverage 2017-01-26 (Van der Bellen inauguration) .. present = his full term. PAGINATION IS UNUSUAL: the pager is cHash-signed (TYPO3 HMAC over params w/ site secret) so query_param cannot synthesise page URLs (404 without a valid cHash); click fails because the site's JS sets the paginator display:none and Playwright won't click a hidden element; no sitemap exists. Resolved by enumerating the 131 cHash-pinned pager pages in start_urls with pagination: none (the engine fetches each start_url and extracts links). Regenerate the start_urls list if coverage ever stops short of 2017-01-26 (walk /aktuelles following li.next a[data-nextlink] over plain HTTP). speaker_default deliberately OMITTED so the tenure crosscheck assigns speaker from country+date (feed also carries Doris Schmidauer items). country=Austria; source_url=https://www.bundespraesident.at/aktuelles; source_name=bundespraesident.at; source_type=official_gov; region=Europe; iso3n=40; content_format=fulltext. FULL RUN pending (researcher gate).

WAYBACK TESTED — NO COMPANION RECIPE NEEDED (researcher asked whether the archive could push Austria further back). Verdict: it cannot; the archive is a strict SUBSET of what the live recipe already gets. CDX for bundespraesident.at/aktuelles*: 1401 statuscode:200 captures, of which 930 match the recipe's speech shape /aktuelles/detail/<slug> — but those captures span only 2020-2026 (2020:273, 2021:258, 2022:149, 2023:79, 2024:86, 2025:69, 2026:16), and ALL captures under the prefix span only 2018-2026. The live recipe already covers 2017-01-26..present (1298 items), i.e. EARLIER and more completely than the archive. So neither a *_wayback.yml nor wayback_extend: true would add a single new speech — it would only re-fetch lossy copies of rows we already have. TO REACH THE FISCHER ERA (Heinz Fischer, 2004-2016) a DIFFERENT prefix would be required: the /aktuelles tree does not exist before ~2018, so the pre-2017 site used another URL scheme (an older shape /aktuelles/detail/news/<slug> is visible with 17 captures) — that needs its own investigation and its own recipe, not wayback_extend (which reuses this recipe's prefix). ALSO NOTE: the recipe was refactored to the new pagination: next_link, replacing 131 hand-pinned cHash URLs; coverage unchanged at 1298 links.
